subscribers.code_text:
def tag_detection(api, detections, memory, current_time):
    # 1. State Initialization
    if "on_break" not in memory:
        memory["on_break"] = False
        memory["state_start"] = current_time

    # 2. Safely check if a person is anywhere in the frame
    person_present = any(
        (d.get("label") if isinstance(d, dict) else getattr(d, "label", "")) == "person" 
        for d in detections
    )

    # 3. Calculate elapsed time
    elapsed = current_time - memory["state_start"]
    
    # Broadcast the exact time to the pipeline (rounded to 1 decimal)
    api.add_global_tag("Hailo", f"TIME:{elapsed:.1f}")

    # 4. Work/Break Logic
    if memory["on_break"]:
        if elapsed < 5.0: # 5 second break
            if person_present:
                api.add_global_tag("Hailo", "STATE:BREAK_VIOLATION")
            else:
                api.add_global_tag("Hailo", "STATE:BREAK_OK")
        else:
            api.add_global_tag("Hailo", "STATE:BREAK_OVER")
            if person_present: # You returned!
                memory["on_break"] = False
                memory["state_start"] = current_time
                
    else: # Working
        if elapsed < 15.0: # 15 second work session
            if not person_present:
                api.add_global_tag("Hailo", "STATE:WORK_VIOLATION")
            else:
                api.add_global_tag("Hailo", "STATE:WORK_OK")
        else:
            api.add_global_tag("Hailo", "STATE:WORK_OVER")
            if not person_present: # You left!
                memory["on_break"] = True
                memory["state_start"] = current_time
